commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an mtime+size device-auth read cache, promise-caches session-target realpath resolution, parallelizes tracked temp-dir cleanup, and bounds iOS APNs registration reads.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a performance/refactor PR. The PR body proves one local device-auth cache behavior, but not the gateway/APNs/session hot paths named in the change.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's realistic gateway/APNs/session proof or decide the credential-cache contract.
